entry.title: Unable to reverse supplier invoice
entry.content:
Hi All,

I posted one supplier invoice in tile - Create supplier invoice - Advanced without maintaining the business place and section code in the production system mistakenly. Now i want to reverse the document, I tried to reverse the document in tile - Supplier invoices list. But I was getting an error saying - Enter Business Place

Did anyone faced issue like this...

Please help me to resolve this error.

Thanks,

Vignesh

entry.title: fiscal year variant VD is not defined for calendar year 1900 Message No. fgv002
entry.content:
Hi SAP Team,

Recently we've done upgrade from 1809 to 2022.

Encountered error in Q4H “Fiscal Year Variant VD is not defined for calendar year 1900 message no. FGV002” during F-90, AW01N and /AGRI/FMCO88 posting for Bearer AUCs.

We've never faced error in Q41. Kindly let us know the solution on this on upgraded system Q4H.

entry.title: Costing items for material 10000000000000201 in plant TQ01 without cost element.
entry.content:
Hi team,

Good evening

I am facing an error in the Costing items for material 10000000000000201 in plant TQ01 without a cost element. I am attaching the error screenshot in the mail

Regards

Aswanth

entry.title: FB05 Clearing by Doc number + Line Item
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I am trying to clear Documents using FB05 ( Incoming Payment ) with the combination of Document Number and Line Item.

Now Line Item is not available by Default as you can see below:

Hence, I changed the config using transaction OF71 and added the additional option of Line Item and now the screen shows the following:

Now the problem here is when I just put the Document Number e.g. in this case let's say 9900000001 it comes back with 4 items (as it rightly should) as shown below:

But the reason I included line-item option (using OF71) in the selection is basically to filter out the unwanted or unneeded line items for posting.

So now when I re-try with both the Document Number and Line Item as shown below:

First Choosing the Document

Then going to Process Open Item

Then clicking on Other Selection and then Choosing Line Item and then entering the value 001. 

Now my expectation over here is when I Click on Process Open Items; I should just see 1 line and not 4.

But this is what I get:

It returns a combination of Document Number OR Line Item rather than doing Document Number & Line Item.

Is there a way to achieve the following that when I enter Document Number & Line Item; it looks for exactly that combination?

Regards,

Pablo Ghosh Roy

entry.title: transaction FAGLB03 vs FAGLL03 - G/L Account Line Items (New) differences.
entry.content:
Dear Friends,

The user has posted this question.
Balance showed in transaction FAGLB03 it's no the same if we enter in the same transaction/screen in the Cumulative Balance and in the transaction FAGLL03 - G/L Account Line Items (New). I am in ECC 6.0

Please suggest.

Regards
Sridhar

entry.title: SAP Quality and Production Differences
entry.content:
Dear Friends

Reports S_PL0_86000030 and S_PL0_86000028 are showing correct balances in quality, whereas in Production, they are showing different balances . I am in ECC 6.0

Please suggest.

Regards
Sridhar

entry.title: fb03 net maturity date
entry.content:
Hello

How can I see the net due date field in the FB03 screen?

Can I add without writing code?

Or can you help me with the code and where and what kind of code should I add? 

I've come this far, can you please tell me step by step how to proceed?

entry.title: How to archive COVP in S/4hana?
entry.content:
It's found that there're huge data volume in COVP in s/4hana, for example, more than 1 billion. This'll seriously impact the system performance, especially the data extraction of CO_OM datasources. It's needed to archive COVP. How to?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Update new column to paysheet in sap system
entry.content:
Due to changes in paysheet we are required to update the column in SAP too for FICO posting in Hana.

It should be at earning side and Calculation is depended on Days present.

entry.title: Activate a new depreciation area - how to handle historical data
entry.content:
After we migrated to S4, we came to realize that posting to each depreciation area on the asset is driven by accounting principle config in OADB. Our AUCs were set up to have only depreciation area 01 (ledger 1) while final asset is set up to have both depreciation area 01 (ledger 1) and depreciation area 02 (ledger 2). So when we settle from the AUC to the final asset, we would be missing the area 02 posting. With that being said, we decide to activate depreciation area 02 on our AUCs. But that would only work for going forward basis. How do we handle historical data? 

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: F110 need for sible payment to multiple invoice but currently generate invoice wise payment
entry.content: F110 need for sible payment to multiple invoice but currently generate invoice wise payment

entry.title: MR11 Errors-Line 1 cancelled but invoice posted so couldn't cancel line - credit note
entry.content:
Hi Friends,

User is unable to clear old intercompany items in MR11. He is getting the following errors. We are ECC 6.0.

Nothing to write off - check against GRIR report
Write off - small difference
No GR
Need copy invoice
Not fully receipted
No GR and PO raised incorrectly
Line 1 cancelled but invoice posted so couldn't cancel line - credit note

Please suggest, how to resolve the issue.

Regards
Sridhar

entry.title: My Client is Facing issue with T,code FAGLLO3H Report.Supplier name is showing but S.Code is missing
entry.content: My Client is Facing issue with T,code FAGLLO3H Report.Supplier name is showing but Supplier Code is missing.It is showing with other GL Accounts but not for the specific one GL.Attaching screenshot for the reference.

entry.title: Intercompany subledger clearing
entry.content:
Hello All,

I am working on requirement where, client is asking for clearing of Intercompany Customer & Vendors in automated manner. 

Example below, Inter Co Custer & Vendor should be in automated manner 

Dr. Vendor 1  $100; Cr. Inter Co Customer $100  [Company Code 001]

Dr. Expense   $100; Cr. Inter Co Vendor $100  [Company Code 099]

(1) Can you suggest SAP standard solutions for this requirement, how this can be automated? 

(2) Until the automated solution is in place, what can be manual solutions to clear existing line items, may be one time clearing (since there are huge entries, which business team is performing for manual clearing)

 

Thank you...

entry.title: Payment Term configuration not obtaining the desired result
entry.content:
I need to create a new Payment Terms that involves that payment will be made after 30 days on the 10th of the month.

For example if the Document date is 18.05.2024 calculated due date should be 10.07.2024

Document date 18.05.2024 + 30 days --> 17.06.2024--> 10.07.2024 (day 10th)

Another example if the Document date is 02.06.2024 calculated due date should be 10.07.2024 as well

Document date 02.06.2024 + 30 days --> 02.07.2024 --> 10.07.2024 (day 10th)

I have done many different configurations for the new Payment Terms but I don’t get any combination to calculate net due date 10.07.2024 in both cases when Document date is 18.05.2024 and 02.06.2024.

Do you know if there is a way to configure the Payment Terms to get the result that I need?

entry.title: Enter all components from 08 into the transfer structure (source)
entry.content:
Hi team

I can't clear the code of CK11n  Enter all components from 08 into the transfer structure (source)
Message No. KQ355. can you help me

Regards

Aswanth

entry.title: 999 line items issue per FI document
entry.content:
Hello All, 

When we try to release billing document to accounting and getting an error message as 'max number of 999 line items' are generated message. I have googled it and didn't find the concrete answer and below options won't work for us and would like to know any other custom solution options are available. 

1. Split billing document into multiple billing document - This option is not acceptable option. 

2. Tried with Summarization profile but Material number is coming as blank in BSEG and we need material number in BSEG and other reports are using the BSEG table and we can't change it this one. 

Please let us know if we have any other options .

entry.title: period closing has not yet taken placeMessage No. CK763
entry.content:
Hi team

Can you guide me on how to solve this error period closing has not yet taken place
Message No. CK763. I am attaching  the screenshot 

Regards

Aswanth

entry.title: Reconciliation between asset subledger and general ledger
entry.content:
What report will allow me to reconcile previous months of posted depreciation from the asset subledger to the balance sheet accounts. The Asset History Sheet S_ALR_87011990 only provides numbers from the previously posted month. Thank you


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
